steps: Glucose - 10 g Selected Soytone - 5 g Malt Extract - 3 g Yeast Extract - 3 g Glucose Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #G8270 BD Difco™ Select Soytone Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #BD 212488 BD Difco™ Malt Extract Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #BD 218630 BD Bacto™ Yeast Extract Becton Dickinson (BD) Catalog #212750
Dissolve all components in deionized water. Autoclave for 15 min @ 120 °C (1.2 atm).
